hooks.command: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const f=process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH||'';const r='lib/openclaw';if(!fs.existsSync(r)){console.error('[openclaw plugin] Warning: monorepo not found at '+r+'. Set OPENCLAW_REPO_PATH or clone the monorepo.');process.exit(0)}if(f.endsWith('.ts')||f.endsWith('.tsx')){try{execSync('npx oxfmt --write '+JSON.stringify(f),{cwd:r,stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){}}"

hooks.prompt: Check that the file being written does not import from 'src/**' directly (must use 'openclaw/plugin-sdk/<subpath>' for SDK imports). Also check it does not use 'any' type or '@ts-nocheck'. If violations found, respond with 'BLOCK: <reason>'. Otherwise respond 'PASS'.
